_comment: Notion is the assumed company knowledge base — NOT an event stream. This is a static reference index the Brief can cite/link when a meeting/Slack/issue references a canonical doc. Per Ilwon: 'Notion에 company-wise 문서가 모두 정리되었다고 전제.'
